basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi – Junior Administrative Assistant – 43 Posts
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Recruitment 2026 for 43 posts of Junior Administrative Assistant. Candidates with 12th pass Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 10-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through AIIMS Delhi official website aiims.edu.

salary_details.pay_scale: Level-2 in the pay matrix of 7th CPC

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Delhi Junior Administrative Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: AIIMS Delhi Junior Administrative Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 43 Posts
